message:
test(proptest): add 14 property tests for connector SDK coverage gaps

New tests covering untested certification/lint types:
- CertificationPhase serde + as_str + Display (6 variants)
- CertificationVerdict serde + as_str + Display
- PhaseVerdict serde + is_pass (all 4 discriminants)
- PhaseResult serde roundtrip
- LintRule serde roundtrip
- LintSeverity as_str + Display + Ord ordering
- SimulationEventType serde (all 10 variants, was 8)
- CertificationTelemetry serde + Default
- CertificationTelemetrySnapshot serde
- CertificationReport passed() invariant + Display
- LintFinding Display format

Total: 25→39 tests (14 new), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
